---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?

A clear description of the problem you'd like solved.
Example: "I always have to manually download results because there's no web dashboard."

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, mockups, prior art, or any other context.
